_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 2 tumor suppressor protein is expressed in oligodendrocytes and regulates cell proliferation and process formation.

_contextSnippet: We also found an evident signal for Merlin allocated around Olig2-positive cell nuclei in the cerebellar white matter of P9 mice
details: Successfully co-localized with Merlin around Olig2-positive cell nuclei in cerebellar white matter of P9 mice
